title: [Cavern, Wobbly Disk]
description: You intensely clutch the thick, cold chain which extends from the wobbly disk platform on which you stand to the cavern ceiling above.  Below you is a seemingly endless drop.  As the disk swaps back and forth, it alternately teases you with being near enough to jump to the ledges to the east or west.

wayto.36434:
;e waitfor 'You swing near the western ledge'
move 'jump ledge'
wayto.36436:
;e waitfor 'You swing near the disk to the east', 'The disk to the east swings near'
move 'jump east disk'
